payload.title: Approve NextSteps ADO Feature ladder plan (ALSAA-11)
payload.prompt: Review docs/plans/nextsteps-ado-feature-ladder-plan.md and docs/ado-routing-matrix.md. Approve to authorize SM ADO execution: 7 Friday Features (0.1.0–0.7.0), User Story mirror for ALSAA-12…18, delivery plan cards on Lab AI Tools.
payload.summary: Scrum Master drafted the NextSteps ADO mirror plan: Feature ladder, Paperclip→Story map, Sprint N iterations, delivery plan strategy. No ADO mutations until approved.
